name: Lucky Block
creator: Pickaxe Studios
shortDesc: Over 200 random outcomes from lucky blocks. Spawn structures, mobs, gear, and surprises. Perfect for multiplayer parties and mini-games.
longDesc: Lucky Block is the most popular lucky block addon for Minecraft Bedrock Edition, featuring over 200 random outcomes, a built-in PvP mini-game mode, and adjustable luck levels. With a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ Minecraft Marketplace reviews, it is the top choice for players wanting unpredictable, exciting gameplay with friends.
features: 200+ Random Outcomes — Diamond gear, custom structures, boss mobs, potion effects, TNT explosions, and more
Lucky Block PvP Mode — Built-in competitive mini-game for 2+ players
Adjustable Luck Levels — Lucky, Normal, and Unlucky settings
Craftable & Natural Spawning — Craft with gold ingots or find them in the world
Works in Any World — Drop into survival, creative, or any custom world
Unlimited Multiplayer — No player limit, perfect for parties
Regular Updates — 8 content updates in the past year

reviews.author: LuckyGamer99
reviews.text: So much fun with friends! The 200+ outcomes keep every block exciting. We've been playing for hours and still getting surprised.

reviews.author: MCContentCreator
reviews.text: Perfect for YouTube videos. Every lucky block break is content gold. The PvP mode is a great bonus.

reviews.author: CasualPlayer_Sarah
reviews.text: Really fun addon! I like the adjustable luck levels so I can control how crazy things get.

faqs.q: What is the best lucky block addon for Minecraft Bedrock?
faqs.a: Lucky Block by Pickaxe Studios is the highest-rated lucky block addon on the Minecraft Marketplace with a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ reviews. It features 200+ unique outcomes, a PvP mini-game mode, and adjustable luck levels. Available for {price} Minecoins.

faqs.q: How many outcomes does the Lucky Block addon have?
faqs.a: The Lucky Block addon features over 200 unique random outcomes including diamond gear, custom structures, boss mobs, potion effects, TNT explosions, treasure rooms, and many more surprises.

faqs.q: Does the Lucky Block addon work in multiplayer?
faqs.a: Yes, Lucky Block supports unlimited players in multiplayer. It includes a dedicated PvP mini-game mode. Only the host needs to own the addon.

faqs.q: How do you craft lucky blocks?
faqs.a: Craft a lucky block by surrounding a dropper with 8 gold ingots on a crafting table. Lucky blocks also spawn naturally throughout the world.
